subject: feat(theme): add Retro combo (cupcake/synthwave) + combo selector
body:
Add a second theme combo using the canva-grid pattern for multi-combo
theme selection. Users can now choose between Luxe and Retro styles
in Settings, each with its own light/dark variant.

Theme combos:
- Luxe: fantasy (light) + luxury (dark) — rich & elegant [default]
- Retro: cupcake (light) + synthwave (dark) — neon & playful

New files:
- constants/themeCombos.ts: Combo definitions with IDs, names,
  descriptions, light/dark theme IDs, and meta colors. Pattern
  adapted from canva-grid's daisyuiThemes.js.

Modified files:
- global.css: Add cupcake and synthwave @variant blocks (oklch values
  from daisyui@5.5.19)
- metro.config.js: Add cupcake/synthwave to extraThemes
- lib/themeColors.ts: Add cupcake/synthwave hex values to THEME_HEX,
  update ThemeName type, make resolveThemeName combo-aware
- hooks/useTheme.ts: Add combo selection with persistence (COMBO_KEY),
  cross-tab sync, expose setCombo/combo/combos in hook result
- components/SettingsModal.tsx: Add Style combo picker UI between
  Theme toggle and Notifications
- uniwind-types.d.ts: Add cupcake/synthwave to theme type list
- scripts/generate-theme-colors.mjs: Generate hex for all 4 themes
- CLAUDE.md: Document combos, update architecture table and structure

Tags: theme, daisyui, feature, settings, combos
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: theme-system
Semver: minor
